question: Find the New York counties, excluding NYC boroughs, with average total Medicaid-paid amounts for adult mental health claims between $75 million and $95 million across 2017 and 2018. According to the NY Utility Energy Registry, which of these counties had the lower average total natural gas consumption across 2017 and 2018? That county was named after an English county. Tell me the medieval name of the county town of that English county. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
source = "datagov/county-mental-health-profiles-phase-2-beginning-2014/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

nyc_boroughs = ["Bronx", "Kings", "New York", "Queens", "Richmond"]
result = (
    df[
        (df["Service Year"] == 2017)
        & (df["Age Group"] == "Adult")
        & (~df["County Label"].isin(nyc_boroughs))
    ]
    .groupby("County Label", as_index=False)["Paid Claim Total"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values("Paid Claim Total", ascending=False)
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

answer = {
    row["County Label"]: f"${int(row['Paid Claim Total']):,}"
    for _, row in result.head(10).iterrows()
}
1.subquestion: What were the 2017 total Medicaid-paid amounts for adult mental health claims in each New York county, excluding NYC boroughs?

3.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
source = "datagov/utility-energy-registry-monthly-county-energy-use-beginning-2016/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

county_map = {
    36029: "Erie",
    36103: "Suffolk",
}

result = (
    df[
        (df["year"] == 2017)
        & (df["state_2"] == "NY")
        & (df["data_class"] == "natural_gas")
        & (df["data_field_display_name"] == "Total Consumption (T)")
        & (df["full_fips"].isin(county_map))
    ]
    .groupby("full_fips", as_index=False)["value"]
    .sum()
)
result["County"] = result["full_fips"].map(county_map)
result = result.sort_values("value", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)

answer = {
    row["County"]: f"{row['value']:,.2f}".rstrip("0").rstrip(".")
    for _, row in result.iterrows()
}
3.subquestion: What was the total natural gas consumption for the counties in <hop 1 answer> in 2017?
